Design Humanizer Chrome extension
Analyzing UI
Analysis Scanning…
  • Hierarchy Weak
  • Spacing OK
  • Repetition Weak
  • CTA focus Weak
  • Layout rhythm OK
Findings 4
  • 6 similar cards detected
  • Weak primary CTA
  • Repeated section rhythm
  • No clear focal point
What it does

Turn AI-generated layouts into interfaces with intention.

AI builders can create screens fast, but the result often feels generic: equal cards, weak hierarchy, repeated sections, and no clear focus.

Design Humanizer helps you improve that first draft. It analyzes the page, detects what feels unfinished, and suggests a cleaner visual structure — without changing your content.

Find weak hierarchy

Detects when every block has the same visual weight and nothing stands out.

Improve layout rhythm

Breaks repetitive grids and helps the page feel more composed.

Strengthen the main action

Makes the primary CTA easier to notice and understand.

Clean up spacing

Improves grouping, margins, and visual balance between sections.

How it works

From AI draft to designed composition.

1

Read the page

Design Humanizer scans the visible structure: sections, cards, buttons, spacing, and repeated patterns.

2

Detect design issues

It finds what makes the interface feel generic: weak focus, repeated cards, flat rhythm, unclear hierarchy, or poor CTA placement.

3

Suggest improvements

You get practical recommendations for layout, spacing, hierarchy, and visual priority.

4

Preview the direction

See how the same content can feel more intentional before applying changes.

Why it matters

Users judge your product before they understand it.

A generic interface makes the whole product feel generic. Even when the idea is strong, weak design can make it look unfinished, copied, or AI-generated.

Design Humanizer helps your interface communicate confidence, clarity, and direction from the first glance.

Your UI does not need more decoration.
It needs a point of view.

Use cases

Built for builders who ship before they polish.

AI-generated landing pages

Make first drafts feel less generic and more trustworthy.

Startup MVPs

Improve your product look before demos, interviews, and launches.

SaaS dashboards

Fix flat metrics, repeated cards, and weak visual priority.

No-code prototypes

Turn fast prototypes into cleaner product screens.

Hackathon demos

Make your project look more convincing before demo day.

Student products

Improve visual quality without needing a full design team.

Waitlist

Stop shipping first drafts.

Join the waitlist and get early access to Design Humanizer — the Chrome extension that helps AI-generated UI feel more human, intentional, and ready to ship.

No spam. Just early access and product updates.

Q&A

Questions & answers

Is Design Humanizer a design generator?

Not exactly. It does not create a random new design from scratch. It analyzes your existing AI-generated interface and suggests how to improve hierarchy, spacing, rhythm, and layout structure.

Will it change my content?

No. The goal is to keep your original content and improve how it is presented.

Who is it for?

Design Humanizer is built for developers, indie hackers, no-code builders, startup founders, students, and anyone using AI tools to build interfaces quickly.

Does it replace a designer?

No. It helps non-designers make better design decisions faster. Think of it as a design critique layer for AI-generated UI.

Will it work with any website?

The goal is to work directly in the browser on landing pages, dashboards, MVPs, and generated frontend screens.

When will it be available?

Design Humanizer is currently in development. Join the waitlist to get early access.

Design Humanizer

A Chrome extension for turning AI-generated interfaces into intentional product design.
